case_title: LARRY SHIH VS. WILLIAM KASEL ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-29-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-17-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF LARRY SHIH. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS WILLIAM KASEL OR TASTE LABS INC., D/B/A TASTE.COM. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
